message:
beads: sync issue tracker with alien uplift comments and timestamp updates

Bulk update to .beads/issues.jsonl reflecting agent activity: updated_at
timestamps refreshed across ~95 issues, and new alien uplift contract
comments added to several beads (runtime_backpressure cluster mapping,
EBR epic success criteria, etc.).
